label: USGS - Missing predicate (full scan)
query: SELECT place, mag, time FROM earthquakes ORDER BY mag DESC

label: USGS - Non-sargable YEAR() predicate
query: SELECT place, mag, time FROM earthquakes WHERE YEAR(time) = 2024 ORDER BY mag DESC LIMIT 20
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: USGS - DISTINCT instead of GROUP BY
query: SELECT DISTINCT place, mag FROM earthquakes ORDER BY mag DESC
expected_issue: DISTINCT used where GROUP BY is more appropriate

label: NOAA - Cross join variant
query:
SELECT w1.STATION, w1.TMP, w2.TMP AS TMP2
FROM weather w1, weather w2

label: NOAA - Missing LIMIT on ordered query
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP FROM weather WHERE TMP > 25.0 ORDER BY TMP DESC
expected_issue: Unbounded result set from missing LIMIT

label: NOAA - Implicit type coercion
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP FROM weather WHERE STATION = 10010099999 AND TMP > 25.0

label: AWID - Nested subquery variant
AWID - OR instead of IN
query:
SELECT wlan_sa, class, radiotap_dbm_antsignal
FROM wifi_network
WHERE class = 'normal' OR class = 'attack' OR class = 'unknown'
ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal
expected_issue: Multiple OR conditions instead of IN list

label: AWID - LIKE with leading wildcard
query: SELECT wlan_sa, class FROM wifi_network WHERE wlan_sa LIKE '%:ff'

label: Products - Missing GROUP BY column
query: SELECT product_name, category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM products GROUP BY category
expected_issue: GROUP BY does not include all non-aggregate columns

label: Products - Non-sargable string function
query: SELECT product_name, price, category FROM products WHERE LOWER(category) = 'electronics' ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 20
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: Orders - UNION instead of UNION ALL
query:
SELECT order_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'
UNION
SELECT order_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = 'shipped'
ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 30
expected_issue: UNION instead of UNION ALL (no duplicate removal needed)

label: Orders - Redundant subquery wrapping
query:
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount, order_date
    FROM orders WHERE total_amount > 100.0
) AS t WHERE total_amount > 200.0

label: Orders - Missing LIMIT with ORDER BY
query: SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount FROM orders ORDER BY total_amount DESC
expected_issue: Unbounded result set from missing LIMIT
